items.title: NASCAR - Kyle Busch RCR Race Lines Black T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: nascar, kyle, busch, rcr, race, lines, black. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
